error_signature: icons not displayed in rich text element
title: Icons not displayed in Rich Text Element
symptom: The options for icons in the rich text element are not visible, indicating a potential bug with icon loading.
not_this_if: Icons display correctly in other projects
root_cause: The rich text element relies on an icon library that may no longer be available or properly linked in the project, leading to missing icons in the UI.
fix_steps: Create a workflow that runs On App Load.
Add a Custom Javascript node to the workflow.
Paste the provided code to import the FontAwesome Icon Library.
Save and run the workflow to ensure icons load correctly.
agent_instruction: Implement the workflow to load the FontAwesome Icon Library on app load.
